latestHandover: Initial audit complete with deeper ecosystem scan. 11 findings across 9 repositories. Reference implementations identified in receptor-infra and planner-backend. Ready for Phase 1 implementation (AGENTS.md propagation).

sessionHistory.summary: Initial research and baseline findings issued. Identified core context gaps (AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md).
Deeper ecosystem scan added technical reference implementations (OpenAPI, Infrastructure Contracts) and architectural gaps in shared service coordination.
